summary: The user is preparing to move into a new home in the 78749 zip code and is seeking assistance with setting up cable, electricity, gas, and home insurance services. They plan to use Trello for organization and have rented a storage unit since March 1st to facilitate the move.
facts: The user is moving into a new home in the 78749 zip code. The user was pre-approved for a $400,000 mortgage from Wells Fargo. The user plans to set up cable and TV services and is considering providers such as Spectrum, AT&T, Google Fiber, Suddenlink, and Grande Communications. The user needs to set up electricity and gas services with providers like TXU Energy, Reliant Energy, Direct Energy, Just Energy, and Texas Gas Service. The user plans to schedule a home insurance policy with Liberty Mutual. The user rented a storage unit on March 1st to store belongings while closing on the house. The user intends to confirm moving details with the storage unit company, including moving date, truck size, and labor assistance. The user has chosen to use Trello as a time-tracking tool for their move.
